sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tu-in sunni tum diaidiai, ka mit khua hong mui hiaihiai;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka sung, ka pua Na mu khin, hong maisak in a
Kilanga ka khialhna le, simtham a ka mawhnate.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhna dahna peng inah, Hong la in, Nangma

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nang na neih loh hang mawhna, na thei ka ginatlohna,
Hong hehpih in hong en aw.
